# truenas_network_config (Data Source)

Provides network configuration from TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_network_config" "current" {}

output "hostname" {
  value = data.truenas_network_config.current.hostname
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `domain` (String) The system domain.
- `hostname` (String) The system hostname.
- `httpproxy` (String) HTTP proxy URL.
- `ipv4gateway` (String) IPv4 default gateway.
- `nameserver1` (String) Primary DNS nameserver.
- `nameserver2` (String) Secondary DNS nameserver.
- `nameserver3` (String) Tertiary DNS nameserver.
